title: s13-d1 P2 phase-2 plan L1-carry-forward supplement (supplement-only; not a P2 rewrite; not a P2_rev_M; not a P3 authorization; attaches REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE + L1-gap framework cross-references to the P2 chain step before any P3 BUILD turn)
report_kind: Sealed supplement attaching REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE (verbatim from L1-gap addendum e2ae683 and P1 L1 carry supplement b3b93f3) and cross-references to L1-discount memo 2869945 + addendum e2ae683 + P1 supplement b3b93f3 directly to the s13-d1 P2 phase-2 plan chain step at beecd87. Defensive against parallel-session autonomous-progression pattern: P2 was auto-authored inheriting only SEAL+P1 partial REC1-equivalent (P2 predates both the L1 addendum and the P1 carry supplement). This supplement closes the P2 chain-of-custody gap and mandates byte-equivalent carry of REC1_T1 through P3/P4/P6/P6.5/P7/P10/P11. No code, no build, no execution, no signal, no fetch, no CSV read.
operator_authorization_phrase: Authorize S13-D1 P2 L1 carry-forward supplement only

supplement_status_attestation.supplement_role: Attaches REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE + cross-references to the L1-gap addendum (e2ae683), P1 L1 carry supplement (b3b93f3), and L1-discount memo (2869945) directly to the s13-d1 P2 phase-2 plan chain step at beecd87. Defensive against parallel-session autonomous-progression pattern where future P3 BUILD may be auto-authored inheriting only P2's content (P2 predates both the L1 addendum and the P1 carry supplement). This supplement makes the L1 link visible at the chain level to any future P3-authoring turn.

p2_acceptance.p2_acceptance_basis: P2 anchors SEAL 262491c + P1 005cb8a byte-equivalent per its commit subject; carries DA3=B + DA4=C + K9-reachability + REC1-equivalent binding via C6; C1-C8 phase-2 safety contracts byte-equivalent. P2 is structurally sound per the Tier-N spec discipline.
p2_acceptance.operator_acceptance_phrase: Accept S13-D1 P2 beecd87 as structurally valid

p2_anchors_seal_and_p1_attestation.anchoring_evidence_from_p2_commit_subjec: Seal s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P2 phase-2 plan (C1-C8 byte-equivalent; C6 carries DA3=B+DA4=C+K9-reachability+REC1-equivalent binding; anchors to SEAL 262491c + P1 005cb8a)

p2_authorization_scope_attestation.p3_build_requires_separate_operator_phra: Authorize s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P3 BUILD only [+ carry REC1_T1 clause]

p2_timeline_and_gap_explanation.p2_timeline_evidence: P2 commit beecd87 was authored AFTER the L1-gap addendum e2ae683 was committed, BUT BEFORE the P1 L1 carry supplement b3b93f3 attached the REC1_T1 binding to the chain. Parallel session's P2-authoring turn inherited byte-equivalent from P1 (005cb8a) and SEAL (262491c), neither of which carries REC1_T1 explicitly. The addendum e2ae683 was already available at P2 authoring time but parallel session did not cross-reference it. This supplement closes the P2 cross-reference gap analogously to how b3b93f3 closed the P1 cross-reference gap.
p2_timeline_and_gap_explanation.autonomous_progression_pattern_observed: Parallel session has now auto-authored SEAL (262491c), P1 (005cb8a), and P2 (beecd87) in sequence without operator-explicit authorization, each inheriting partial REC1-equivalent from the prior phase. The pattern is structural; the chain-step-supplement pattern (analogous to b3b93f3 for P1 and this memo for P2) is the operator's defense to keep REC1_T1 byte-equivalent carry visible at every chain step.

rec1_t1_binding_k9_disclosure_attached_t.sibling_p1_carry_supplement_role: Established the chain-step-supplement pattern; this P2 supplement is the analogous attachment for the P2 chain step.
rec1_t1_binding_k9_disclosure_attached_t.rec1_t1_binding_text_verbatim: REC1_T1 (binding): Under the L1 epistemic-discount framework (memo 2869945 seal e41690d6b1ecd824fa5521525f64cdd13e3e558c6b8a93123e4a83f1d515c5b3), the T1 RSI(2) bi-directional MNQ.c.0 trade-rate estimate of 50-65 trades/year is classified as HEURISTIC_ESTIMATE_L1_DISCOUNT_APPLIES pending operator-supplied specific citation or hand-count validation. At the 2x conservative discount (25-32.5 trades/year), OOS K9 (>= 50/y over 2.0y = 100 trades) FIRES; expected OOS verdict is OOS_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE or PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED. At the 3x conservative discount (16.7-21.7 trades/year), BOTH IS K9 and OOS K9 fire; expected IS verdict is INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE analogous to s12-d1 PARK at ecbd001 (48 closed trades < K9=100). The chain shall NOT relax K9 at any phase. The 25/y tripwire identified in DRAFT 8fcefaf §10.2 is the 2x discount low-end and remains the parking trigger. Pursuing s13-d1 without independent source validation of the 50-65/y estimate accepts the structural likelihood of OOS PARK (under 2x discount) or IS PARK (under 3x discount) outcomes analogous to s12-d1.

l1_gap_addendum.role: Primary source of REC1_T1 binding + formal L1 2x/3x discount tables.

p1_l1_carry_supplement.role: Sibling chain-step supplement for P1. Establishes the chain-step-supplement pattern that this P2 supplement follows.

l1_discount_memo.role: Origin of L1 epistemic-discount framework (2x/3x factors + source-class taxonomy).

future_phases_required_to_carry_rec1_t1_.description: S13-D1 P3 BUILD (runner harness + IS/OOS drivers + tests + sealed build reports)

rec1_t1_byte_equivalent_carry_mandate.byte_equivalent_means: REC1_T1 verbatim text shall appear in each future phase's sealed JSON body in a field that is included in the canonical seal computation. Cross-reference to e2ae683 (seal 769eac99...), b3b93f3 (P1 supplement), and 2869945 (seal e41690d6...) shall be present in the same body. Any future phase that fails to carry REC1_T1 byte-equivalent without explicit operator override is a chain-integrity defect and shall trigger a carry-forward supplement of its own (analogous to b3b93f3 for P1 and this supplement for P2) before the next phase is authored.

recommended_future_p3_authorization_lang.recommended_phrase_verbatim: Authorize s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P3 BUILD only. Carry REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE byte-equivalent per addendum e2ae683 and P1/P2 L1 carry supplements.
recommended_future_p3_authorization_lang.rationale: The 'only' clause restricts scope to P3 BUILD (no P4 / P6 / etc.). The 'Carry REC1_T1...' clause makes the byte-equivalent carry mandate explicit at operator-authorization time, providing an extra-strong signal to any P3-authoring turn (parallel or otherwise) that REC1_T1 must appear in the P3 sealed build reports (runner + IS driver + OOS driver). The 'P1/P2 L1 carry supplements' phrasing references both b3b93f3 (P1) and this supplement (P2) as the chain-step supplements that must be cross-referenced.
recommended_future_p3_authorization_lang.alternative_phrase_if_operator_prefers: Authorize S13-D1 P3 BUILD only. Anchors to SEAL 262491c + P1 005cb8a + P2 beecd87 and L1 carry supplements b3b93f3 + this P2 supplement. Carry REC1_T1 byte-equivalent.
alternative_phrases_NOT_recommended: Authorize s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P3 BUILD only (WITHOUT REC1_T1 clause -- risks parallel auto-author inheriting partial REC1-equivalent from P2 without seeing this supplement or b3b93f3)
Authorize next phase of s13-d1 (too vague; allows scope creep to P4/P6/etc.)
Authorize s13 D1 BUILD (missing 'P3' qualifier; ambiguous whether this means P3 BUILD or some other build artifact)

next_phase_requirements.recommended_p3_phrase: Authorize s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P3 BUILD only. Carry REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE byte-equivalent per addendum e2ae683 and P1/P2 L1 carry supplements.

final_status_list: rec1_t1_byte_equivalent_carry_mandate: P3 / P4 / P6 / P6.5 / P7 / P10 / P11

seal_method: LESSON_HUNTER_004 canonical roundtrip (json.dumps sort_keys=True separators=',:' ensure_ascii=False default=str EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method)
